name: Pinit
description: Pinit desktop companion relay channel plugin. Connects to Cloudflare Workers via WebSocket and dispatches client messages into the local OpenClaw agent runtime.

relayUrl.description: HTTPS base URL of the Pinit relay (e.g. https://primo.evomap.ai). The plugin will derive wss://.../ws/openclaw from this.

linkCode.description: 6-character link code provided by the Pinit desktop client.

secret.description: Paired secret provided alongside the link code.

sessionLabel.description: OpenClaw session label used when dispatching messages to the agent. Defaults to 'mobile-app'.

emotionWrapperEnabled.description: Whether to wrap inbound user messages with the Pinit emotion-prompt template before agent dispatch. Defaults to true.

allowFrom.description: Reserved; Pinit defers authentication to the Cloudflare Workers relay (via linkCode+secret), so this is unused in the default configuration.
